abilities.name: Don't Turn Your Back
abilities.text: Enemy models that activate engaged with this model may not declare the Interact action until the end of their activation.

abilities.name: Extended Reach
abilities.text: Enemy models within 2" cannot take attack actions generated by the Charge action.

abilities.name: Laugh Off
abilities.text: If this model would be moved from an enemy model's effect, it may discard a card to choose not to.

actions.name: Nagamaki
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If the target has a Sp of 7 or greater, this action receives +1 Skl.

triggers.name: Heave
triggers.text: Place the target anywhere within 3" of this model.

triggers.name: Erase Their Legacy
triggers.text: Remove all enemy Scheme markers within (aura)2" of the target.

actions.name: Extortion
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This model may drain a (soulstone) to draw range and LoS from any ally in play. The target gains a Stunned token. For each raise this action receives, move the target up to 3".

triggers.name: Sashimono
triggers.text: Immediately, the target suffers -2 to its final duel total.

triggers.name: Darkness
triggers.text: Make a Shadow marker within 1" of the target.
